nasb.text: Then to the rest of the sons of Kohath were given by lot, from the family of the tribe, from the half-tribe, the half of Manasseh, ten cities.

esv.text: To the rest of the Kohathites were given by lot out of the clan of the tribe, out of the half-tribe, the half of Manasseh, ten cities.

cnv.text: 哥轄其餘家族的子孫從瑪拿西半個支派中，抽籤分得十座城。

ccb.text: 哥辖族其余的人从玛拿西半个支派中抽签分到了十座城。
